query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customApps WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as apps_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userApps WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as user_apps_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appVersions WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as versions_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appData WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as data_count;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3HixaTvZ1BE3FFg.root --database cJLhozXEame73NuZqMLXuR --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customApps WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as apps_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userApps WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as user_apps_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appVersions WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as versions_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appData WHERE appId = 'all-widgets-test-app') as data_count;
